nasb.text: and the stars of the sky fell to the earth, as a fig tree casts its unripe figs when shaken by a great wind.

esv.text: and the stars of the sky fell to the earth as the fig tree sheds its winter fruit when shaken by a gale.

cnv.text: 天上的星辰墜落在地上，像無花果樹被大風搖動，落下還沒有成熟的果子。

ccb.text: 天上的星辰都坠落，好像未成熟的无花果被狂风吹落一般。

csbs.text: 天上的星辰坠落到地上，就像无花果树被大风摇动，落下它未熟的果子那样。
